acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Town of Woodside CA and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harrassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: San Mateo County SO is the operator of the Flock system under it's agreement with Town of Woodside. All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
overview: Town of Woodside CA (SMCSO) uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Town of Woodside CA (SMCSO) utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Town of Woodside CA (SMCSO) utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
additional_info:
